name: CADDYSHACK
about: Caddyshack is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines golf simulation with a sports bar atmosphere. The facility features three 15x15 simulator bays equipped with FlightScope Mevo+ launch monitors and GSPro software, providing an immersive golfing experience on world-renowned courses. It caters to both casual players seeking entertainment and serious golfers looking to practice, with amenities including a full bar, food options, and additional recreational activities like pool, darts, and arcade games.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Mevo+ with GSPro technology for highly accurate shot tracking and realistic course play
Tour-level simulator bays with premium strike mats and putting turf for authentic practice
Diverse game options including world-famous courses, Golden Tee arcade, and user-created creative courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides premium strike mats and putting turf, but you can bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available on-site, but outside food and beverages may be restricted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally it takes 1 hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. Additional time should be booked for more players.

faq.question: Is Caddyshack kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Caddyshack is family-friendly and welcomes all ages with a fun-packed atmosphere.
